title: chelyocarpus dianeurus
intro: Chelyocarpus dianeurus, also known as the 'Horse Palm', is a species of palm tree native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its sap, which contains saponins that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Chelyocarpus dianeurus include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant's sap are typically made into a tincture or infused in hot water as a tea to harness its medicinal benefits.
